response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong full-stack development experience and a passion for open-source projects, but his background lacks deep specialization in C++ for industrial automation or cloud platform solutions. His recent roles emphasize TypeScript, Node.js, and AI-agent infrastructure, which diverge from the core C++ and industrial cybersecurity requirements of this role. However, his early C/C++ experience at National Instruments and problem-solving skills may warrant further exploration.
strengths: Extensive experience with low-latency and high-performance systems (e.g., DLang at Sociomantic, C++ at National Instruments).
Proven leadership in mentoring, technical documentation, and cross-functional collaboration (e.g., workshops, open-source contributions).
Strong problem-solving and adaptability across diverse domains (embedded, web, IoT, and automation).
concerns: Limited recent hands-on experience with C++ (last significant role was 2015) and industrial cybersecurity standards (IEC 62443).
Primary expertise lies in TypeScript/Node.js and full-stack development, not the core C++/STL focus required for this role.
No explicit experience with message brokers, MQTT, or industrial protocols (e.g., Modbus, OPC UA) mentioned in the resume.
